codeReview.summary: The album cover hover effect is correctly implemented and matches the specification. The feature was already implemented in commit c7946bd (refine frontend motion), and no code changes were needed by the worker. The implementation uses group-hover:scale-[1.02] for exactly 2% scale, duration-500 for ~500ms transition, and ease-out for smooth easing. The parent div correctly has 'group' and 'overflow-hidden' classes for the hover trigger and clipping.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker correctly followed the frontend-polish-worker skill procedure - started services, captured screenshots, ran validators (lint and build), documented verification steps. No deviations noted.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows proper sequence: Read mission/validation files → Review code → Run npm run lint (exit 0) → Run npm run build (exit 0) → Start services → Use agent-browser for visual verification → Stop services. Handoff correctly reports skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The handoff reports commitId as '50fd309' which is a docs commit for loading-refinement milestone, not related to the album-cover-hover-effect feature implementation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Git show 50fd309 shows 'docs: add user testing synthesis for loading-refinement milestone'. The actual implementation commit c7946bd 'refine frontend motion' added the hover effect in frontend/src/App.tsx. Worker made no code changes (correct, since feature already existed), but the commitId in handoff should be the implementation commit (c7946bd) or null when no changes are made.

summary: PASS - The album cover hover effect is correctly implemented with scale-[1.02] (2%), duration-500 (~500ms), and ease-out easing. The parent cover-frame div has the required 'group' class for hover triggering and 'overflow-hidden' for clipping. The worker correctly identified that no code changes were needed since the feature was already implemented. The implementation fulfills all requirements of VAL-MICRO-001. Note: The handoff commitId points to an unrelated docs commit; the actual implementation is in c7946bd.
